mapper.select:
SELECT p.person_id AS personId, p.person_name AS personName, p.person_relation AS personRelation, tmp.coverUrl, tmp.faceId, COUNT(DISTINCT f.face_id) AS total, MAX(f.create_time) AS createTime FROM person p
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pf.person_id, f.person_cover_url AS coverUrl, f.face_id AS faceId, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY pf.person_id ORDER BY pf.representative DESC, pf.update_time DESC ) AS rn FROM person_face pf INNER JOIN face f ON pf.face_id = f.face_id
INNER JOIN user_file uf ON f.file_id = uf.file_id AND uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.is_deleted = 0 WHERE f.is_processed = 1 AND f.is_face = 1 ) tmp ON p.person_id = tmp.person_id AND tmp.rn = 1
INNER JOIN person_face pf_main ON p.person_id = pf_main.person_id INNER JOIN face f ON pf_main.face_id = f.face_id AND f.is_processed = 1 AND f.is_face = 1 INNER JOIN user_file uf_main ON f.file_id = uf_main.file_id AND uf_main.user_id = #{userId} AND uf_main.is_deleted = 0 WHERE p.person_id = #{personId} AND p.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY p.person_id, tmp.coverUrl, tmp.faceId ORDER BY createTime DESC

SELECT person_id AS personId, person_name AS personName, person_relation AS personRelation, coverUrl, faceId, total, createTime FROM ( SELECT p.person_id, p.person_name, p.person_relation, f.person_cover_url AS coverUrl, f.face_id AS faceId, COUNT(DISTINCT f.face_id) AS total, MAX(f.create_time) AS createTime,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY p.person_id ORDER BY pf.representative DESC, pf.update_time DESC ) AS rn FROM person p INNER JOIN person_face pf ON p.person_id = pf.person_id INNER JOIN face f ON pf.face_id = f.face_id
INNER JOIN user_file uf ON f.file_id = uf.file_id AND uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.is_deleted = 0 WHERE pf.user_id = #{userId} AND f.is_processed = 1 AND f.is_face = 1 AND p.display = #{display} GROUP BY p.person_id, f.face_id, pf.representative, pf.update_time ) tmp WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY createTime DESC

SELECT f.face_id, f.file_id, f.user_id, f.is_processed, f.feature_vector, f.person_cover_url, f.person_object_name, f.create_time, f.is_face FROM person_face pf INNER JOIN face f ON pf.face_id = f.face_id INNER JOIN user_file uf ON f.file_id = uf.file_id AND uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.is_deleted = 0 WHERE pf.user_id = #{userId} AND pf.person_id = #{personId} AND f.is_processed = 1 AND f.is_face = 1 AND f.feature_vector IS NOT NULL ORDER BY pf.representative DESC, pf.update_time DESC, f.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
